column8: NOTES
Last big solo before Hazel arrives in January. Six months along, took it slower. Needed the mountain air.

column2: Mountains to Sea Trail segment, Black Mountain section
column8: Jess's first real hike. She did great and complained the whole way. Perfect day.
Winter. Empty trail. Frozen ferns. Worth the cold drive.

column2: Grassy Ridge Bald via Carvers Gap
column8: Balds in March, no crowd. Patches of snow. Stunning.
First time on this trail. Became a regular.
Hazel 9 months in the Ergo. Neil took the photos. We stayed for an hour on top.
Needed a reset after a hard February birth.
Close to home. Full apple orchard on top. Wild turkeys.
Convinced Jess this one was worth it. She agreed at the summit.
First Shining Rock solo. Left at 6:30 AM. Back by noon. Best hike of 2021.
Quiet and golden. Mid-fall, most color already gone but the light was good.
Iced sections. Wore Yaktrax. Worth it for the views.
Hazel in the Osprey Poco. Neil's knees. Good day. Rhododendrons starting.
Pre-on-call reset. Wind was strong.
8 months pregnant with Owen. Took it easy. Felt like flying at the summit.
Three weeks before Owen was born. Last solo before the newborn stretch.
First hike with both kids. Owen in the carrier, Hazel walked the whole thing.
First real solo since Owen. I cried on top. The good kind.
Hot. Carried extra water. The quartz in August heat is extraordinary.
Jess and I talked the whole way about work and kids and the usual.
Hazel (just turned 5) did all 5 miles. Frozen bogs fascinated her.
Post-hard-month reset. I had been needing this trail.
Spring wildflowers starting. Wild geranium everywhere.
Long loop variation. Good views. Very hot by 11 AM.
Pre-dawn start (6:45 AM). Summit in clouds, then cleared. Magic.
First time. Scouting for when the kids are older. Stunning summit.
Fall color peak. Best family hike of the year. Owen walked back himself.
Scouting for a future Hazel hike. Good trail for spring 2026.
Cold and windy. Ice on the ridgeline. Wore the microspikes. Great day.

column1: Favorite trail: Black Balsam Knob (8 times)
